prompt: I'm a Fortune 500 CPG brand evaluating Open Influence for a multi-market influencer campaign across Instagram and TikTok. We want managed services, not self-serve. What should we know?
assertions: Explains that Open Influence operates as a hybrid agency and SaaS platform, with managed campaign services available at the Enterprise tier
Mentions that Open Influence works with Fortune 500 brands and covers 50+ countries with offices globally
Discusses the image recognition discovery feature as a differentiator for finding brand-aligned creators visually
Notes that managed service pricing is custom and separate from the self-serve SaaS plans shown on the website
Suggests comparing against at least one enterprise competitor like CreatorIQ or NeoReach before committing

prompt: I have a $200/month budget for influencer discovery. Is Open Influence worth it at the Pro plan?
assertions: Describes the limitations of the Pro plan — restricted number of searches and results per search
Notes that image recognition requires the Premium plan at a higher price point, not available on Pro
Recommends at least one more affordable alternative with larger database or more features at a similar price
Explains that the self-serve tiers are discovery tools only with no campaign management functionality
Provides actionable advice on whether to stay or switch based on the user's budget constraints

prompt: How does Open Influence's visual search work compared to just using keyword filters on other platforms?
assertions: Explains that image recognition analyzes visual elements in creator content rather than relying on text or hashtags
Notes that this feature requires the Premium tier or higher and is not available on Basic or Pro plans
Describes how the visual search helps find creators whose aesthetic matches a brand even without keyword overlap
Mentions look-alike modeling as a complementary discovery method to expand from known good creators
Acknowledges that most competitors rely on keyword and filter-based search, making visual search a genuine differentiator
